rows.label: qev070102_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Now then, I'm going to ask you some
questions, and you're going to answer
them accurately and quickly, alright?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0002
rows.name:
If you say anything unnecessary
or lie... Well, I'll just kidnap
you and change the venue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0003
rows.name:
You don't want to get involved in any
unnecessary trouble, right? I think
you'd better just quietly obey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0004
rows.name:
So, question one... What did
Doctor B ask you to do?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0010
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0011
rows.name: Honestly reveal the request you received from Doctor B.

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gud who he actually is.

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0005
rows.name:
...What's he going to use
a thing like that for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0006
rows.name:
That big guy's technology is
truly beyond our comprehension.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Ah... What foolish people you
are... Is the question of who I
am more important than your life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Fine. In that case, I'll just take you
to a VIP room where no one can enter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0009
rows.name:
I'll show you exactly how Gud-sama
does his job. You... won't be
able to go home anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0010
rows.name:
Now for question two. ...What do
you know about his research?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0030
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0031
rows.name: Honestly say you don't know.

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask why he is interested in Doctor B's research.

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0011
rows.name:
He's a cautious guy. I figured he
wouldn't tell you that easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0012
rows.name:
*Sigh*... It's a troublesome job, but I
suppose I won't get my hands on that
technology unless I kidnap the man himself...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0013
rows.name:
Ah... What foolish people you
are... Is my interest more
important than your life?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Fine. In that case, I'll just take you
to a VIP room where no one can enter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0015
rows.name:
I'll show you exactly how Gud-sama
does his job. You... won't be
able to go home anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Alright, thanks for your cooperation.
This is the last question.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0017
rows.name:
Question three... If you're going to die,
which is better: being sunk in the sea, or
getting turned into a honeycomb right here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0050
rows.name: Sea

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0051
rows.name: Answer that you want to be sunk in the sea.

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0060
rows.name: Honeycomb

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0061
rows.name: Answer that you want to be turned into a honeycomb.

rows.label: qev070102_JNK0070
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev070102_SEL0071
rows.name: Rebel, saying you have no intention of being killed.

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0018
rows.name:
I see, I see! Then let's head to
the sea right now! To the deep,
dark bottom of the ocean...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0019
rows.name:
Gud-sama will gently sink you
down. Without making you taste
even a bit of suffering.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0020
rows.name: I see, so you prefer something flashy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0021
rows.name:
Then, as requested, I'll pump your
entire body full of bullets![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0022
rows.name: Ho... Quite the confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070102_MSG0023
rows.name:
But you will soon regret it
as you are engulfed in the
inescapable terror of death![ST:wait ]
